known_violation.reason: Call station does not extend to toilet and bathing facilities as required.
Clear width 36 in is below the 41.5 in required for bed-movement egress doors.

known_violation.citation: FDA Hospital Bed Entrapment Guidance (2006) / ASTM F1858
known_violation.reason: Legacy rail geometry does not document entrapment-zone conformance.
Porous, non-cleanable upholstery is unsuitable for infection control in resident areas.
Flooring is not slip-resistant, increasing avoidable fall risk.
